description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a graphic t-shirt with a bold design and flame motif at the bottom. He wears knee-length cargo shorts and a pair of low-top sneakers, suitable for walking in city environments. His head is covered by a baseball cap, and he also wears a face mask, adding a contemporary urban touch. The figure's arms are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and neutral. The overall appearance suggests a modern, streetwise individual, possibly blending into a metropolitan or neighborhood setting. Accessories such as the cap and mask contribute to a sense of anonymity and urban style.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian in a graphic t-shirt, cargo shorts, sneakers, baseball cap, and face mask, standing upright. The outfit and accessories evoke a modern urban street style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt with a prominent design and flames, face mask, baseball cap, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, mask, and the length of the cargo shorts, with visible sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the t-shirt with flame graphics at the hem, and the back of the cap and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the cap, mask, and sneakers, with arm and leg positioning visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual graphic t-shirt, knee-length cargo shorts, baseball cap, face mask
